title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what the pointer targets and why it matters. The system reimagines the classic pointer interface by adding AI-powered capabilities to improve how users interact with on-screen content.
